productDisplayName: Spice Art Women Hand Woven Maroon Clutch
description: Look your glamorous best with this spice art clutch, customised for the ethnic diva in you. Show off your traditional side with this piece, which is as functional as it is fashionable. Width: 28 cm Height: 10 cm Made of synthetic leather in mat-weave style, with nylon inner lining Stone embellishments on the left of the clutch on the front One main compartment with a magnetic clasp A zippered compartment inside the main compartment Care Wipe surface with a damp clean cloth
